delivery: warm short body, ONE word-anchored hyperlink, plus the fixed branded signature (config/signature.*). HTML body with plain-text fallback.
subject: A little research we did on Big Dan's
message_text:
Hi Dan and Sarah,

We've spent the week digging into how Big Dan's runs, right down to your availability page. It tells folks that any date not showing online means a call to Sarah. So every booking the calendar can't handle lands on one phone, across three ports and four boats. We did the actual work on it, a short read on what we found and the one fix we'd start with. It's free and it's the write-up (https://alaskaaihq.com/awesomeproposal/big-dans-fishing-charters/), and we were honest about the parts that are hard too. If it's useful just reply and I'll send more.
signature: appended from config/signature.html + config/signature.txt: Talk soon, / Talon Sturgill / Alaska AI / alaskaaihq.com | docket@alaskaaihq.com | book a call. No locality claim.
opens_on: Big Dan's own availability page instruction to call Sarah at 907-598-3391 for anything the FareHarbor calendar can't answer.
style: warm short template, one hyperlink, branded signature, no in-state claim, per OUTREACH_CRAFT.md
note: KEEPER draft is r-8807614413480364979. Trash all earlier Big Dan's drafts: r-7973169061408695746, r-2246071020174168078, r-1608404883784757473, r-1471126463601649721. Cut the generic 'kept landing on one thing', the 'built by agent team' line, and the false 'in-state' claim (Talon is not in Alaska).
